message: Every stakeholder can ask the same simple question, then require the same proof package before trust escalates.

stakeholders.name: Community user
stakeholders.ask: Before I trust this claim, where is the proof package?
stakeholders.requires: Public proof package URL, readable summary, current decision state.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: DAO delegate
stakeholders.ask: Before I vote yes, what evidence supports the proposal?
stakeholders.requires: Mission contract, evidence docket, validation note, risk ledger, receipt boundary.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Grant committee
stakeholders.ask: Before a payout, did the milestone pass acceptance?
stakeholders.requires: Acceptance criteria, proof mapping, reviewer signoff, payout readiness receipt.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Treasury council
stakeholders.ask: Before funds move, what proves the vendor earned them?
stakeholders.requires: Deliverable evidence, replay notes, authority decision, settlement gate.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Security reviewer
stakeholders.ask: Before closure, can the fix be independently checked?
stakeholders.requires: Finding map, patch evidence, test output, residual risk, challenge window.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Investor or partner
stakeholders.ask: Before diligence passes, what proof supports the project’s material claims?
stakeholders.requires: Claims matrix, proof status, unresolved risks, receipts, governance boundary.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: Enterprise procurement
stakeholders.ask: Before approval, does the project meet institutional evidence standards?
stakeholders.requires: RFP proof checklist, responsible owners, audit trail, redaction boundary.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.

stakeholders.name: AI-agent operator
stakeholders.ask: Before the agent is paid or reused, what ProofBundle validates the work?
stakeholders.requires: Task trace, tool scope, validator review, signed receipt, reusable capability gate.
stakeholders.escalation: No proof package → hold trust, funding, governance, settlement, or public reliance.
